testcase.name: example > should pass
AppContext — cart > starts with an empty cart
AppContext — cart > addToCart increments count and total
AppContext — cart > adding the same product again increases quantity
AppContext — cart > addToCart opens cart (cartOpen=true)
AppContext — cart > removeFromCart clears the item
AppContext — cart > updateQuantity sets new quantity
AppContext — cart > updateQuantity(id, 0) removes the item
AppContext — cart > total reflects sum of all items
AppContext — promo codes > WELCOME10 sets promoDiscount to 10% of total
AppContext — promo codes > LUXURY20 applies when total exceeds minAmount
AppContext — fp helper > fp uses default CNY currency
checkoutSchema > accepts a fully valid payload
checkoutSchema > rejects empty name
checkoutSchema > rejects malformed email
checkoutSchema > rejects phone shorter than 7 chars
checkoutSchema > rejects invalid paymentMethod
checkoutSchema > accepts all three valid payment methods
checkoutSchema > rejects giftMessage longer than 100 chars
checkoutSchema > accepts giftMessage of exactly 100 chars
checkoutSchema > optional address fields can be omitted
checkoutSchema > defaults isGift to false when omitted
contactSchema > accepts valid contact form data
contactSchema > rejects message shorter than 10 chars
contactSchema > rejects missing name
contactSchema > rejects invalid email
contactSchema > allows optional phone and subject
batchCodeSchema > accepts PA-2025-001
batchCodeSchema > accepts PA-2025-999
batchCodeSchema > rejects lowercase pa-2025-001
batchCodeSchema > rejects missing leading PA
batchCodeSchema > rejects wrong digit count in batch number
batchCodeSchema > rejects empty string
batchCodeSchema > rejects arbitrary string
formatPrice > formats NZD with symbol and no decimal
formatPrice > formats CNY with ¥ symbol
formatPrice > formats USD with US$ symbol
formatPrice > formats large CNY amount with thousand separator
PROMO_CODES definitions > WELCOME10 is a 10% percent discount with no minimum
PROMO_CODES definitions > LUXURY20 requires minAmount of 500
PROMO_CODES definitions > ALPACA50 is a fixed $50 discount
applyPromo calculation > WELCOME10 gives 10% of cart total
applyPromo calculation > WELCOME10 is case-insensitive
applyPromo calculation > LUXURY20 fails when cart is below 500
applyPromo calculation > LUXURY20 applies when cart is exactly 500
applyPromo calculation > LUXURY20 applies 20% when cart exceeds minimum
applyPromo calculation > ALPACA50 gives fixed 50 regardless of cart total
applyPromo calculation > unknown code returns false
cart total calculation > single item × 1 in NZD
cart total calculation > single item × 2 doubles the total
cart total calculation > two different items sum correctly in NZD
cart total calculation > uses CNY prices when currency is CNY
cart total calculation > uses USD prices when currency is USD
cart total calculation > empty cart total is 0
cart total calculation > cart count sums quantities
shipping threshold logic > order below 500 NZD incurs shipping
shipping threshold logic > order at exactly 500 NZD is free shipping
shipping threshold logic > duvet-classic at NZD$579 qualifies for free shipping
product catalogue > has at least 8 products
product catalogue > every product has prices for all three currencies
product catalogue > every product has a non-empty id
product catalogue > duvet-classic exists and is featured
product catalogue > CNY prices are approximately 4.5× NZD prices
exchange rates > NZD base rate is 1
exchange rates > CNY rate is 4.5
exchange rates > USD rate is 0.6
